tasks.subject: Task 1: 작업단위 키 플러밍 (keys.py + StateFile.remove_page)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 복합 키(`<uuid>#half`) 생성/분해 순수 함수 + `StateFile.remove_page`(page-uuid와 모든 `uuid#*` 삭제).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/lib/keys.py", "pipeline/desktop/lib/state.py", "pipeline/tests/lib/test_keys.py", "pipeline/tests/lib/test_state.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/lib/test_keys.py tests/lib/test_state.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unit_keys_for_page split T/F", "page_uuid_of / half_index_of", "remove_page drops uuid and #halves, keeps others"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: 빈-띠 탐색 raster 헬퍼 (raster.py + local_vlm 공유)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** local_vlm의 순수 Pillow ink_row_mask/find_gap_near를 lib/raster.py로 추출, s2/타일러 공유, torch 미유발.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/lib/raster.py", "pipeline/desktop/ocr_backends/local_vlm.py", "pipeline/tests/lib/test_raster.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/lib/test_raster.py tests/ocr_backends/test_local_vlm.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["find_blank_row_near snaps to central gap", "falls back to target when all ink", "no torch import", "existing local_vlm tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Config 폴더 라우팅 (FolderRoute/folders/route_for, dropbox 선택값)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** rM 폴더명→{노트북,제목포맷,분할,라벨} 라우팅(코드 기본값+오버라이드+레거시 폴백), dropbox 키 선택값.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/lib/config.py", "pipeline/desktop/bootstrap.py", "pipeline/tests/lib/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/lib/test_config.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["route_for default folders", "unknown folder falls back to Notes", "folders override", "dropbox keys optional", "legacy config compat"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Payload — 이미지 제거 + 슬립 스켈레톤 + 제목 플레이스홀더
tasks.description:
**Goal:** build_note_content_xml/build_payload 이미지 제거, 슬립 스켈레톤, {datetime}/{unit_key}/{label} 플레이스홀더.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/lib/tomboy_payload.py", "pipeline/tests/lib/test_tomboy_payload.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/lib/test_tomboy_payload.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["whole body no image/hr", "slip skeleton layout", "slip title matches isSlipNoteTitle regex", "build_payload unit_key marker, no image_url"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: s2_prepare — sourceFolder 라우팅 + 슬립 분할
tasks.description:
**Goal:** s2가 sourceFolder로 분할 판단, 분할 폴더는 PAGE_HEIGHT//2 근처 빈띠에서 위/아래 크롭→복합키 2개. skip/force 페이지 단위.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/stages/s2_prepare.py", "pipeline/tests/stages/test_s2_prepare.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/stages/test_s2_prepare.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["whole page 1 key page.png", "split 2 composite keys + 2 pngs", "cut at fixed 936 even when 2400 tall", "skip/force page-scoped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: s4_write — Dropbox 제거 + route 기반 노트북/제목 + 슬립 + 빈 건너뛰기
tasks.description:
**Goal:** s4 Dropbox 미사용, 복합키별 route_for로 노트북/제목/슬립 스켈레톤, 빈 OCR 단위 건너뛰기.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/stages/s4_write.py", "pipeline/tests/stages/test_s4_write.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/stages/test_s4_write.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no dropbox/notebook_name/title_format args", "diary 일기 no link:url", "slip 2 notes [0] Slip-Box 上/下 skeleton", "empty ocr skipped", "I1 marker uses unit_key"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: s1_fetch — 복합 키 캐스케이드
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 재페치/force 시 하위 상태에서 page-uuid와 uuid#* 모두 제거(remove_page).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/stages/s1_fetch.py", "pipeline/tests/stages/test_s1_fetch.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/stages/test_s1_fetch.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["refetch clears uuid#* downstream", "force clears composites", "existing s1 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: rM 푸시 스크립트 — 다중 폴더 + sourceFolder (README)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** pi/README.md 정본 푸시 스크립트를 Diary/Notes/Slip-Notes 3폴더 루프로 교체 + metadata sourceFolder.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/pi/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "bash -n /tmp/diary-push.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TARGET_FOLDERS loop Diary/Notes/Slip-Notes", "DocumentType children skip pdf", "metadata has sourceFolder", "verify section mentions slip 2 notes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: tomboy-diary 스킬 문서 갱신
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 스킬 본문에 다중 폴더/슬립 분할(작업단위 키)/이미지 폐지 반영.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude/skills/tomboy-diary/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["I1 unit-key generalization", "I3 three folders + sourceFolder", "image abolition reflected", "slip split section added", "file map updated"]}
```
